ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "general_size" TEXT /* General size classification (e.g., 0X, 1X, 2X) */,
  "us_clothing_size" TEXT /* US clothing size equivalent */,
  "eu_clothing_size" TEXT /* European clothing size equivalent */,
  "asian_clothing_size" TEXT /* Asian clothing size equivalent */,
  "chest_bust_measurement" INTEGER /* Chest/bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_measurement" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_measurement" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches (8 inches from the waist) */,
  "shoulder_measurement" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length in inches */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length in inches (for pants) */,
  "thalic_measurement" INTEGER /* Thallic measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred clothing size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size for this item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this item in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of this item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each clothing size

Timestamp for when the size was added

ID of the customer's preferred clothing size
Timestamp for when the customer profile was created

Timestamp for when the inventory item was added

Timestamp for when the order item was created
